highlights.text: After FOMC in my Wednesday 4pm newsletter, I noted: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote at the close yesterday: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
Institutions buy dips via Failed Breakdowns.
The most violent Failed Breakdowns occur after the most violent dips, and these are typically going to be data/news driven.
In this case, the Failed Breakdown was of last Friday’s 6633 low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll run down the 4 major Failed Breakdowns we had this week since Tuesday (its been one of the active weeks for Failed Breakdowns this year).
ES is flagging 6708-14 to 6675 with 6693 a magnet inside.

post_title: Three Green Weeks In A Row For September. Will SPX Put In 4/4 Next Week? Sept 22 Plan
